findings.title: getProfilesAction returns raw UserProfile including phoneNumber + fcmTokens
findings.summary: dbAdapter.getUsers returns raw Firestore docs; any signed-in user can dump 10 users at a time including phone, FCM tokens, adminRoles, billing flags.
findings.fix: Whitelist same fields as getPublicProfileAction, or delete the action (no in-app callers).

findings.title: Public profile UI exposes email to any signed-in viewer
findings.summary: getPublicProfileAction includes email; UI shows it unconditionally. Fallback string 'Contact Hidden' shows original design intent was gated.
findings.fix: Gate email behind connStatus === 'connected'; strip from server projection unless caller is a confirmed connection.

findings.title: sendChatMessageAction has no audioUrl host validation
findings.summary: Community-chat path missing the firebasestorage.googleapis.com host check that sendGroupChatMessageAction enforces. Enables tracking-pixel audio, open-redirect, and potential crash payloads.
findings.fix: Copy validator from groups.ts:616-618; add length cap on audioUrl.

findings.title: followTeacherAction allows self-follow
findings.summary: No guard for followerId === followingId. Inflates follower stats, pollutes following feed, sends self-notification.
findings.fix: Reject self-follow at top of action.

findings.title: toggleLikeAction allows self-like
findings.summary: No guard preventing post author from liking their own post; inflates likesCount.
findings.fix: Reject self-like, or mark and exclude from public counts.

findings.title: getGroupAction returns group doc to non-members
findings.summary: Only requireAuth, not requireGroupMember. Exposes name/description/autoJoinRules/memberCount to any signed-in user. May be intentional for Discover Groups.
findings.fix: Confirm intent; if private, gate behind requireGroupMember.

findings.title: Community-chat text cap is 500, playbook expected 1000
findings.summary: Playbook step 6 expects 1000-char cap; actual is 500.
findings.fix: Reconcile playbook vs cap; 500 may be intentional for mobile.

confirmed_safe: storage.rules: voice-messages/{uid} enforces uid ownership + 5MB + audio MIME (storage.rules:19-26)
Recommendation engine: same-school +30, same-district +15, subject +20/match, grade +5/match
